acceptance_targets: [ch13-award-01] PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:173, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:285 contain no more than one direct abstract statement about care/control and the other two moments make the shift legible through concrete object or action detail. FAIL if all three passages still restate the same insight in analytical terms.

[FA-018] Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6344 now feels like this argument's distinct version of resistance and avoids unreadable, blank, or flat-face shorthand. Fail if the line still defaults to that mask.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:173, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:285 contain no more than one direct abstract statement about care/control and the other two moments make the shift legible through concrete object or action detail. FAIL if all three passages still restate the same insight in analytical terms.
findings.problem: The chapter lands Lena's changed understanding, then explains the same care-as-control insight three times in closely related analytical language. That repetition lowers the sense of live discovery and keeps the chapter just short of shortlist-level force.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:153, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:173, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:285, keep only one explicit interpretive sentence about care turning coercive. Rebuild the other two moments around local evidence already present in the scene: the labeled envelopes on the step, June wrapping the framed photos, and Eli's voice note borrowing June's posture, so Lena's rereading arrives through altered perception rather than repeated thesis language.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6344 now feels like this argument's distinct version of resistance and avoids unreadable, blank, or flat-face shorthand. Fail if the line still defaults to that mask.
findings.problem: The 9-chapter unreadable-face pattern returns again here with the same tired unreadability bundle at exactly the point where Lena and June need sharper differentiation after the reveal pressure starts building.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:6344 so June's refusal lands through a concrete look, movement, or clipped sentence specific to this argument, not the familiar unreadable mask. The chapter needs escalation, not fallback diction.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
